name: IR/Raman Phase Finder
summary: Add an XRD-style Pin control in the right tab corner that locks panel splitter movement.
Allow importing multiple Raman or FTIR experiment files in one action.
Normalize aligned reference previews with the same data used for matching.
Keep double-click and Reset view focused on experimental spectra only.
Preserve the existing layout, laser, drag-and-drop and element gate workflows.
